# pfsense_rest_api_settings (Resource)

Manages pfSense REST API package settings (authentication methods). Requires the REST API package to be installed.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pfsense_rest_api_settings" "example" {
  auth_methods = ["BasicAuth", "KeyAuth"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auth_methods` (List of String) List of enabled authentication methods. Valid values: `BasicAuth`, `KeyAuth`, `JWTAuth`. Must contain at least one method.
